title: P2P.org launches real-time data stream for Sui and Hyperliquid
summary: P2P.org, a blockchain infrastructure provider operating validators across 40+ proof-of-stake networks since 2018, today launched Syncro Data Stream, a real-time blockchain data stream for Sui and Hyperliquid.

title: Argentina bill targets crypto payments to illegal gambling sites
summary: Argentina’s proposed online gambling bill would restrict banks, payment firms and crypto providers from serving unauthorized betting platforms.

title: Three Exchange-Traded Funds to Watch
summary: From leveraged bets on obscure semiconductor firms to thematic products targeting nicotine, check out these latest—and in some cases curious—launches.

title: Drone Stock Backed by Trump Son Soars on US Funding Hopes
summary: Shares of drone makers and suppliers rallied Thursday after a report said the Trump Administration is exploring potential funding deals with a group of companies to increase domestic production and lower costs.

title: Sequans (SQNS) Completes Bitcoin Unwind, Exits Digital Asset Strategy After Less Than a Year
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Sequans (SQNS) Completes Bitcoin Unwind, Exits Digital Asset Strategy After Less Than a Year
Sequans Communications exited its Bitcoin treasury strategy in under a year after selling most of its holdings to retire convertible debt, leaving about 658 BTC and refocusing on its core I

title: Bitcoin Price Falls 5.5% in 5 Days to Below 73,000 as Spot ETF Outflows Accelerate
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin Price Falls 5.5% in 5 Days to Below 73,000 as Spot ETF Outflows Accelerate 
Bitcoin price has fallen more than 5.5% over the past week to around $72,600 as spot ETF outflows and rising U.S.-Iran tensions fueled broader risk-off sentiment.

title: What the Clarity Act Means for the Rest of the World
summary: The Senate’s crypto bill has supporters excited—and opponents concerned—about the bill’s potential reverberations beyond America’s borders.

title: Google Engineer Charged Over $2.75 Million in Alleged Polymarket Insider Trading Bets
summary: The Google employee case is the second federal prosecution tied to alleged prediction market insider trading on Polymarket.

title: Tether’s USAT supply grows 540% month-over-month, latest attestation shows
summary: Tether’s USA₮ supply grew six-fold month-over-month to over 140 million tokens, according to Anchorage Digital's latest attestation.

title: Hyperliquid-based prop trading platform Hypernova raises $3 million in pre-seed funding
summary: Hyperliquid-based prop trading platform Hypernova says it offers "instant payouts" and plans to publicly launch within the next two months.

title: EU wants crisis powers to seize control of chip supplies
summary: Chipmakers could be forced to override existing contracts under draft law
